title: Synoptix
description: A framework built on Pytorch, Pytorch Lightning and Rich, providing a rapid, comprehensive and intuitive interface for training and evaluating Deep Learning-based Weather Forecasting models.

title: Surge
description: SURGE: a novel upstream-conditioned precipitation nowcasting framework designed to tackle extreme storm events

title: FF14ypst
description:
A Typst template for FF14 strategy guides writing and publishing.
 - Easy to write: You only need to focus on the content, and the template will take care of the formatting and layout.
 - Easy to publish: You can export your strategy guide as a **PDF** or HTML file, and share it with your friends or the FF14 community.

title: Salvation's Edge: Truth. Raid puzzel solution
description: A puzzle solution for the raid puzzle in Destiny 2: Salvation's Edge, which is a part of the Lightfall expansion. The solution is based on the concept of truth and involves a series of steps to solve the puzzle.
